name: @rivus/agent-task-loop-desktop
description: Local-first desktop console for agent-task-loop (RFC 0010). Loopback HTTP + SSE + Bearer token, Electron shell.

scripts.dev:electron: tsc -b && rm -rf dist/src/ui && cp -R src/ui dist/src/ui && cp src/electron/preload.cjs dist/src/electron/preload.cjs && electron dist/src/electron/main.js
scripts.build: tsc -b && rm -rf dist/src/ui && cp -R src/ui dist/src/ui && cp src/electron/preload.cjs dist/src/electron/preload.cjs
